info.title: Partner Intake OS Action API
info.description: Safe GPT-facing Action Pack for Partner Intake OS. Exposes partner classification, recommendations, onboarding, campaign, and event logging endpoints. The Tally webhook endpoint is intentionally not exposed.

servers.description: Replace with the deployed Vercel project domain.

get.summary: Check Partner Intake OS API health.
get.description: Returns API status, runtime hints, environment configuration presence, and timestamp.

post.description: Accepts a normalized/manual partner intake and returns classification, scorecard, tier, onboarding path, risk level, and profile preview.
Returns resource recommendations based on partner type, audience, onboarding path, and risk level.
Returns a structured onboarding plan for the first 24 hours, first 7 days, and first 30 days.
Returns a campaign recommendation with CTA, suggested channels, first post/email/script ideas, tracking notes, and compliance guardrails.
Accepts a CRM-ready partner event and returns a logged confirmation. Batch 06 storage mode determines where this is written; mock mode returns a safe simulated log.

bearerAuth.description: Use Authorization: Bearer YOUR_PARTNER_INTAKE_OS_ACTION_TOKEN. The value should match PARTNER_INTAKE_ACTION_TOKEN in Vercel.

PartnerIntake.description: Raw or normalized partner intake from manual entry, GPT review, import, or Tally normalization.

partner_type_claimed.description: Self-selected or inferred partner type before classification.

audience.description: Who the partner serves or can influence.
audience.example: service businesses, contractors, and local operators

funding_experience.description: Experience referring, advising, or brokering funding opportunities.
funding_experience.example: Refers clients who ask about working capital options.

traffic_or_network_size.description: Audience, client base, list size, deal flow, or community reach.

desired_partner_role.description: What role the partner wants to play.

notes.example: Interested in a clean referral process with educational resources.

example.audience: service businesses, contractors, and local operators
example.funding_experience: Refers clients who ask about working capital options.
example.notes: Wants educational referral assets and a clean handoff.

notes.example: Likely good referral partner; keep messaging readiness-based.

Scorecard.description: Structured scoring output for partner tiering and review. Individual criteria use 0-5; overall_score uses 0-100. Higher compliance_risk_score means higher risk.

compliance_risk_score.description: 0-5 score where higher means higher compliance risk.

reasoning_summary.description: Plain-English reason the tier and risk were chosen.
reasoning_summary.example: Classified as cpa_bookkeeper with strong trust and low compliance risk.

Classification.description: Classification object returned by the Batch 05 classify endpoint.

reason.description: Why this resource fits the partner.
reason.example: Helps the partner understand what funding conversations should be routed and how to frame readiness.

compliance_safe_positioning.example: Position as educational readiness guidance; do not promise approvals, amounts, or outcomes.

task.example: Confirm partner profile, audience, and desired role

offer_angle.example: Help clients understand funding readiness before cash crunches become emergencies.

first_post_idea.example: Funding conversations go smoother when records and expectations are clean.

first_email_idea.example: Soft intro from trusted advisor for an educational readiness conversation.

first_script_idea.example: This is not a guarantee of funding; it is a practical review of options and readiness.

tracking_notes.example: Use partner_id, campaign_id, source, and UTM parameters when tracking links exist.

event_id.description: Optional event ID. If omitted, API can generate one.

summary.example: GPT classified partner and recommended standard onboarding.

intake.audience: service businesses, contractors, and local operators
intake.funding_experience: Refers clients who ask about working capital options.
intake.notes: Wants educational referral assets and a clean handoff.

event_id.description: Optional event ID. If omitted, API can generate one.

summary.example: GPT classified partner and recommended standard onboarding.

example.summary: Classified as cpa_bookkeeper and recommended standard onboarding.

x-safety-notes.summary: Inbound form webhook route intentionally omitted from the GPT Action Pack.
